protein_name: May act as a cross-bridge between fibrils and other extracellular matrix molecules. Involved in skeletal myogenesis in the developing esophagus. May play a role in organization of the pericellular matrix or the sphinteric smooth muscle. Belongs to the fibril-associated collagens with interrupted helices (FACIT) family. Localized to vascular, neuronal, mesenchymal, and some epithelial basement membrane zones in umbilical cord. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
